examples: I wanted to prove myself better than Firestone.
I just sold the place to Mitch Heedy at Firestone.
Today the Firestone brand is internationally known as a symbol of quality rubber products.
Bent on living a dream, Linus Hall quit his engineering job at Bridgestone Firestone in 2001.
Quality suffered, productivity fell and then came the Ford-Firestone fiasco, costing billions in repairs and goodwill.
